task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only, cannot start/end with hyphen)
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS Lambda function resource with basic properties (FunctionName, Runtime, Handler, Role)
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS IAM role ARN formats (arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name)
